    expect(element).toHaveTextContent()

    Expected element to have text content:
      analyzing repository structure
    Received:
      analyzing repository structur

      45 |     await act(() => stream.push(chunk));
      46 |     const bubble = screen.getByTestId("assistant-bubble");
    > 47 |     expect(bubble).toHaveTextContent("analyzing repository structure");
         |                    ^
      48 |   });
      49 |
      50 |   it("retries on transient SSE disconnect", async () => {
